articles.title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics
articles.description: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.

articles.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
articles.description: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

articles.title: Patreon lays off 20% of its workforce
articles.description: In a memo to staff that was posted online, Conte said the company's core business is strong, but the platform has to respond to market changes and adjust its cost structure to remain stable.

articles.title: Insurance startup Corgi reportedly raised more money at $4B — its third round in 8 weeks
articles.description: In the AI-funding frenzy, many startups are raising back-to-back rounds at ever-increasing valuations — but even by those standards, Corgi stands out.

articles.title: Tesla’s door handles may spur new US safety rules
articles.description: The new rule-making process follows a series of incidents, including fatal ones, in which people have become stuck inside cars.

articles.title: Meta drops out of a major clean energy pact as its natural gas buildout accelerates
articles.description: Meta has made significant investments in natural gas over the past year. Now it's dropping out of an industry renewable energy group.

articles.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
articles.description: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

articles.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
articles.description: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

articles.title: US government says Iran-linked hackers are disrupting American water and energy providers
articles.description: An updated government advisory warns that Iranian hackers are exploiting systems used by water and energy providers.

articles.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
articles.description: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

articles.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
articles.description: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

articles.title: Tesla’s robotaxis are moving in reverse
articles.description: The number of paid robotaxi miles traveled fell 36% in the second quarter, despite expanding to new cities, according to Tesla's own figures.

articles.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
articles.description: David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

articles.title: Google will now let you sign in to your account with a selfie video
articles.description: The tech giant says selfie videos give users more options to sign in if they're ever locked out or don't have access to their usual phone or computer.

articles.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
articles.description: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

articles.title: Edtech platform raises $4.5M to help teach students how to vibe code
articles.description: Imagi announced a $4.5 million seed round, with investors including Brighteye Ventures, Day One Capital, and artist Will.i.am.

articles.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
articles.description: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

articles.title: Google’s Gemini nears billion-user milestone
articles.description: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.

articles.title: Amazon is bringing games to Prime Video
articles.description: Amazon is hoping the addition of games can turn Prime Video into a one-stop entertainment destination.

articles.title: MeBeMe’s new ‘interrupter’ app helps you become your best self instead of doomscrolling
articles.description: MeBeMe delivers small tasks to help users become their best selves instead of endlessly scrolling.

articles.title: Microsoft responds to LG monitors installing McAfee ads on Windows
articles.description: App is installed through Windows Update when certain LG monitors connect to a PC.

articles.title: FDA reports new outbreak of explosive diarrhea with 72 cases identified
articles.description: The FDA hasn't said where the cases are or how they're linked.

articles.title: Forgot your Google password? Now you can log in with a selfie.
articles.description: Google's selfie videos can be used for account access, AI Avatars, and age verification.

articles.title: AI Kill Switch Act would let Trump admin order shutdown of rogue AI systems
articles.description: Bill would let Homeland Security chief decide when an AI should be shut down.

articles.title: Final Coyote vs. Acme trailer drops at SDCC
articles.description: Also, the full trailer for Zach Cregger's Resident Evil features a likable everyman.

articles.title: A woman got a UTI. Two years later, the bacteria had evolved, invaded her brain.
articles.description: The case provides a novel report of the emergence of heterovirulence.

articles.title: Sony's decision to ditch discs was practically inevitable, data shows

articles.title: Google just had its first negative cash flow quarter due to massive AI spending
articles.description: Google continues to report big quarterly revenue, but its AI spending has skyrocketed.

articles.title: AI arms race in line for a reckoning after OpenAI hacking incident
articles.description: Aggressive training techniques sharpens threat of bad behavior by leading models.

articles.title: White House report says Trump can usher in a "new golden age" of science

articles.title: I wanted a clock that never needed setting. Things escalated.

articles.title: Watch orcas ram a sunfish so hard it explodes
articles.description: “We think this may help younger orcas feed more easily, or it could also just be for fun.”

articles.title: Sales were up at Tesla but so were costs and spending
articles.description: Q2 2026 was profitable, but barely.

articles.title: Microsoft brings original Xbox backward compatibility to Windows PCs
articles.description: First four compatible titles can be run with an 11-year-old graphics card.

articles.title: ISPs' long nightmare of having to list all the fees they charge is finally over

articles.title: Clayface trailer leans into the body horror

articles.title: Hyundai claims humanoid robot plan is not part of talks with striking workers

articles.title: Next Space Force chief throws cold water on the idea of space privateers

articles.description: "This is day one for cybersecurity in the age of agents," Hugging Face CEO says.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **自动驾驶与机器人领域重大人事变动**：Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua将卸任，公司正全力推进自动驾驶出租车及机器人业务；同时，特斯拉的自动驾驶出租车项目进展受阻，其门把手设计也可能引发美国新的安全法规出台。
2. **AI芯片与基础设施竞争白热化**：AMD推出Helios AI机架级系统，直接挑战英伟达；AI芯片初创公司Etched以103亿美元估值获大额投资，市场对AI算力的争夺持续升温。
3. **科技公司裁员与融资动态**：Patreon宣布裁员20%；保险初创公司Corgi在8周内完成第三轮融资，估值达40亿美元；前谷歌安全高管创立的AegisAI获3600万美元融资，专注防御AI驱动的网络钓鱼攻击。
4. **AI应用与安全新进展**：Anthropic更新Claude语音模式，提升模型能力；OpenAI向全美用户开放ChatGPT健康服务；Runway推出AI模型路由器，应对生成式媒体领域的拥挤竞争；谷歌允许用户通过自拍视频登录账户。
5. **网络安全与能源政策动向**：美国政府称伊朗黑客正攻击美国水电基础设施；Meta加速天然气建设并退出重大清洁能源协议，同时发布以“人类灭绝”歌曲为背景的AI广告，引发争议。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI芯片竞争进入白热化阶段，AMD与Etched等新老玩家同时发力，试图打破英伟达的市场主导地位；而特斯拉在自动驾驶出租车领域的困境与Mobileye的战略转型，则揭示了自动驾驶行业正面临技术与商业化的双重考验。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **多领域AI技术开源与工具更新**：Hugging Face发布多项开源进展，包括Nunchaku 4位扩散模型推理集成至Diffusers、机器人操作数据记录系统Grabette，以及物理AI仿真现状综述。
2. **AI在医疗与新闻行业的应用深化**：OpenAI推出ChatGPT健康功能，并发布新闻机构利用AI提升使命的案例，同时宣布面向小企业的ChatGPT计划。
3. **AI基础设施与安全治理推进**：OpenAI公布与Effingham County社区共建AI基础设施、与Hugging Face合作应对模型评估安全事件，以及针对长周期模型的安全对齐研究。
4. **企业级AI效率提升案例**：NTT DATA集团利用Codex将事件分析时间缩短至30分钟，展示AI在运维领域的实际价值。
5. **AI治理与行业合作拓展**：OpenAI基金会及集团董事会新增David Vélez和Robin Vince，并发布AI时代评估记分卡，同时谷歌在Galaxy Unpacked 2026上推出3项AI更新。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI技术正加速从开源工具、行业应用到安全治理的全链条渗透，其中OpenAI与Hugging Face的联合安全行动及长周期模型对齐研究，标志着行业对AI风险管控的重视进入新阶段。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **科技与AI竞争加剧**：美国试图限制中国AI发展，但硅谷持续使用中国AI模型；中美在人形机器人、星链技术等领域展开激烈博弈。
2. **能源与产业挑战**：中国上半年太阳能新增装机量同比下降66%；印度太阳能产业因依赖中国供应链而受困；中国国内鸡蛋价格飙升对民生造成冲击。
3. **网络与通信新动向**：微软Teams将于2026年7月28日起在中国被限制；中国推进单栈IPv6网络及监控版本建设。
4. **经济与政策规划**：中国新五年计划引发关注；中国推出ROAs（区域运营协议）相关举措；Z世代自由职业者面临现实困境。
5. **地缘与技术安全**：中国与俄罗斯被讨论是否具备摧毁星链的能力；中国自主神话体系与“脆弱时刻”等叙事引发国际讨论。

今日最值得关注的发展是：中美在人工智能和人形机器人领域的科技竞争持续白热化，中国在推进自主技术的同时，也面临能源结构转型与外部限制的双重压力。
